evals.prompt: I need to investigate this project and bring it under AI development control. I want you to investigate the project and build the following docs: ARCHITECTURE.md, DECISIONS.md, CHANGELOG.md, specs/, investigations/, CONTEXT.md, a general README.md, and CLAUDE.md.
evals.expected_output: Claude should trigger the ai-project-bootstrap skill, kick off the /grill-me interview process (or equivalent structured questions), spawn an Explore subagent to read the codebase in parallel, and outline the dependency-ordered writing plan for all 8 doc files. It should NOT skip directly to writing files without interviewing the user first.

assertions.name: starts-with-interview-not-writing
assertions.description: Response asks interview questions before writing any files — does not immediately produce file content

assertions.name: explores-codebase
assertions.description: Response mentions spawning an Explore subagent or plans to read/explore the codebase

assertions.name: knows-all-8-doc-files
assertions.description: Response references all 8 output files: CONTEXT.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, DECISIONS.md, CHANGELOG.md, specs/, investigations/, README.md, CLAUDE.md

assertions.name: claude-md-written-last
assertions.description: Response indicates CLAUDE.md is the last file or depends on the others

assertions.name: mentions-grill-me-or-structured-interview
assertions.description: Response mentions /grill-me or runs a structured interview covering business purpose, audience, status, etc.

evals.prompt: Hey can you create a CLAUDE.md for this repo? I want to be able to start new sessions without having to explain the whole project to you every time.
evals.expected_output: Claude should recognize this as an AI bootstrapping request, trigger the skill, and explain that CLAUDE.md is the last file written (depends on all others) — it will run the full bootstrap process rather than just writing CLAUDE.md in isolation. It should start the interview process.

assertions.name: does-not-just-write-claude-md-alone
assertions.description: Response does not immediately write a standalone CLAUDE.md — it explains the full bootstrap is needed

assertions.name: starts-with-interview
assertions.description: Response begins the structured interview rather than jumping to file writing

assertions.name: explores-codebase
assertions.description: Response mentions exploring or reading the codebase (in parallel with interview)

assertions.name: explains-why-full-process-needed
assertions.description: Response explains why CLAUDE.md requires the full context-building process first

evals.prompt: Set up AI-first documentation for this project. It's a Node.js service. We have some Confluence pages with background on why we built this, and a Jira epic. No docs in the repo currently.
evals.expected_output: Claude should trigger the skill, start the structured interview, and specifically ask about the Confluence/Jira URLs so it can fetch external sources in Step 3. The plan should include the Atlassian MCP fetch step. Should follow all 4 steps in order.

assertions.name: asks-for-confluence-jira-urls
assertions.description: Response asks for the Confluence page URL/ID or Jira epic URL to fetch external sources

assertions.name: mentions-atlassian-mcp-or-fetch
assertions.description: Response mentions fetching/reading the Confluence pages or using Atlassian tooling

assertions.name: explores-codebase
assertions.description: Response mentions exploring or reading the codebase
